question: The line chart shows revenue for several years. Which statement is most accurate based on the chart?

options.A: Revenue increased by the same amount between each pair of consecutive years shown.
options.B: The last two years shown have identical revenue values.
options.C: The highest revenue value is cut off at the top of the chart, so its exact level cannot be read.
options.D: Revenue decreased in at least one of the years shown.

explanation: The bar tops are clipped outside the visible plotting area, so equality or ordering for the clipped bars cannot be inferred.
